name: TCIL_SetValueRaw, TCIL_SetValuePhysical
title: TCIL_SetValueRaw, TCIL_SetValuePhysical
syntax: long TCIL_SetValueRaw(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, long value); // form 1
description: These functions set the value of a data entity without sending any command.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.
